datasetValidation: Every datasetId must exist in the canonical SQL dataset registry
Canonical dataset metadata must match actual SQLite seed schema
Every referenced table and column must exist
Expected result rows must match executed solution rows
conceptStageValidation: sql-foundations must not use joins, aggregates, mutation SQL, CREATE TABLE, or subqueries
sql-analysis-reporting may use expressions, aliases, functions, aggregates, GROUP BY, and HAVING
multi-table-sql may use joins, aliases, formatting, and beginner subqueries
sql-data-management may use INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, and CREATE TABLE in sandboxed exercises
sql-database-design-capstone may use all previously taught beginner concepts
mutationSafety: UPDATE and DELETE exercises must require WHERE unless explicitly marked unsafe demo
Mutation exercises must run in isolated sandbox state
Mutation projects should include SELECT preview steps
INSERT exercises should prefer explicit column lists
visuals: Image placeholders must stay as placeholders when mapped
Join/design courses should include table relationship or ERD-style visuals
